userImpact: Raw data retrieval jobs now fetch a limited default dataset instead of all available data, reducing unnecessary data loading and improving performance unless users explicitly request more data.
author: ianmcgraw

title: chore(deps): update dependency faker to ~=30.1.0
summary: Updated the Faker dependency from ~=30.0.0 to ~=30.1.0. This minor version update includes enhancements to the en_IN address provider with PIN Code range and union territories support.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1521 fix data retrieval job status on failure
summary: Updated exception handling in the data retrieval job executor to properly mark jobs as failed when data upload encounters errors (connection failures to Shield or upload failures to the platform). Previously, these failures were not reflected in the job status, making it difficult to diagnose data pipeline issues.
userImpact: Users can now see accurate job status when data retrieval jobs fail during upload, enabling better visibility into pipeline errors and troubleshooting.
author: ianmcgraw

title: chore(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies: redis from 5.0.8 to 5.1.0 and uvicorn from ~0.30.6 to ~0.31.0. Redis 5.1.0 introduces client-side caching support and fixes several bugs including RESP3 set handling and ClusterPipeline issues.
userImpact: No direct user impact. Dependency updates are applied automatically to maintain current library features and bug fixes.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1519 reuse redis client across threads
summary: Fixed an issue where Redis clients were not being reused across threads, causing unnecessary connection overhead. The dependency injection configuration now ensures a single Redis client instance is shared by all threads.
userImpact: Redis operations across multiple threads now use a shared client connection, improving performance and reducing resource consumption.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1519 fix redis connection 2
summary: Fixed Redis connection errors in the app plane configuration by updating connection settings and CloudFormation templates. The previous fix attempt failed due to incorrect serverless cache endpoint configuration.
userImpact: The app plane can now successfully establish connections to the Redis serverless cache without connection errors.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1519 fix redis connections
summary: Fixed SSL Redis connection configuration that was preventing proper TLS/SSL connections to Redis instances. The fix updates connection settings in the application configuration and dependency injection setup to correctly handle SSL certificates and protocols.
userImpact: Redis connections with SSL/TLS are now established correctly, resolving connection failures for secure Redis deployments.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1516 fix shield connector
summary: Fixed shield connector to correctly paginate over all available inferences when the single `page` filter is not set. The connector was not properly handling pagination in cases where the page parameter was absent, resulting in incomplete data retrieval.
userImpact: Users can now retrieve all available inferences from the shield connector without having to manually specify page parameters, enabling complete data access in pagination scenarios.
author: ianmcgraw

title: chore(deps): update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies: authzed (0.18.2 → 0.19.0) and authzed/spicedb (v1.36.2 → v1.37.0). These are routine minor version updates to keep dependencies current with bug fixes and improvements.
userImpact: No direct user impact.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: NO-REF: Roll back user creation on failure
summary: Previously, if updating a user's type in Keycloak failed during user creation, the user would be left in a malformed state without proper role bindings. The bootstrap process would then silently succeed on retry, masking the incomplete setup. This change now rolls back user creation if the Keycloak type update fails, ensuring users are only created when fully initialized.
userImpact: User creation now properly fails and rolls back if the Keycloak type update fails, preventing incomplete user states and bootstrap process masking setup failures.
author: peter496

title: chore: remove old stacks from a bad rebase or something
summary: Removed orphaned CloudFormation stack files that were inadvertently committed during a rebase. These files are no longer needed and have been cleaned up to restore the repository to a consistent state.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: jdb-arthur

title: fix: grafana target group
summary: Fixed an issue with the Grafana target group configuration in the Arthur Scope CloudFormation stack. This corrects the ECS service configuration to ensure Grafana is properly registered with the correct target group.
userImpact: Grafana services deployed via Arthur Scope now correctly register with their target group, ensuring proper load balancing and service accessibility.
author: jdb-arthur

title: feat: new_stacks
summary: Added a comprehensive baseline of CloudFormation stack definitions for Arthur Scope infrastructure. This includes core infrastructure stacks (VPC, IAM, ECS, load balancer, security groups), database stacks (RDS, TimescaleDB), and application service stacks (authentication, authorization, app plane, data plane, frontend, monitoring). The stacks are organized by deployment layer and provide the foundational infrastructure-as-code templates for the Scope platform.
userImpact: Users can now deploy Arthur Scope infrastructure using the provided CloudFormation stack definitions, enabling standardized and reproducible infrastructure provisioning on AWS.
author: jdb-arthur

title: Update dependency numpy to v2
summary: NumPy dependency upgraded from v1 to v2 (specifically v2.1.1). This major version update includes bug fixes, regressions resolved since 2.1.0, and improved compatibility with Python 3.10-3.13. Updated Docker configurations and requirements files across app_plane, data_plane, and metrics_db services to use the new version.
userImpact: Users benefit from NumPy 2.x improvements including better performance, bug fixes, and enhanced array interface handling, while maintaining compatibility with supported Python versions.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: Update dependency Faker to v30
summary: Updated Faker dependency from v29.0.0 to v30.0.0. This is a routine dependency update that includes a change to force slug generation to always use ASCII characters.
userImpact: No direct user impact.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: Update dependency datasketches to ~=5.1.0
summary: Updated the datasketches library dependency from ~=5.0.2 to ~=5.1.0 across app_plane and data_plane requirements. This minor version update brings improvements and fixes from the latest datasketches release.
userImpact: Users benefit from datasketches library improvements and bug fixes included in version 5.1.0.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1495 add better URL parsing to API client
summary: The API client would fail when configured with a URL ending in a slash. This fix improves URL parsing to extract only the scheme and host, allowing the client to work correctly regardless of trailing slashes in the configuration.
userImpact: API clients configured with URLs ending in a slash will now connect successfully without errors.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-846 - Refactor how dataset schemas are defined, support column aliasing
summary: Introduced a rigid dataset schema model with column aliasing support to address column naming conflicts in joins and enable better UI support for schema editing. The new `DatasetSchema` layer includes unique column IDs, source names, and an alias mask for friendly column naming. Each schema node now has a unique ID to support advanced features like field extraction without relying on string-based paths.
userImpact: Users can now alias conflicting column names when joining datasets, and the system can detect column name conflicts upfront rather than at query time.
author: peter496

title: UP-394 proof read API docs
summary: Corrected typos and response codes across all API documentation in the router modules. This comprehensive proofread ensures that API documentation accurately reflects expected behavior and response codes for all endpoints across alerts, connectors, data retrieval, projects, and other core services.
userImpact: API documentation now contains accurate descriptions and correct HTTP response codes, enabling developers to integrate with the API more reliably.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-394 fix API docs SSO
summary: The API docs Authorize button was redirecting to an incorrect URL that didn't match the load balancer's `/api` prefix, causing requests to fail with a not-found error. This fix corrects the redirect URL to properly route through the `/api` prefix and updates the Keycloak client configuration to allow the corrected redirect URL.
userImpact: Users can now successfully authorize API docs requests through the Authorize button without encountering not-found errors.
author: ianmcgraw

title: Add rate/count of failures for toxicity
summary: Added rate and count metrics for toxicity failures to the MVP Shield dashboard in Grafana. This provides better visibility into toxicity-related failure patterns through consistent data point spacing on bar charts.
userImpact: Users can now monitor toxicity failure rates and counts directly from the Grafana dashboard with improved chart consistency.
author: zach.fry

title: UP-509: enable container insights
summary: Enabled Container Insights for ECS cluster monitoring. This allows detailed metrics and logs to be collected for the CloudWatch dashboard, providing better visibility into container performance and health.
userImpact: Users can now view detailed container performance metrics and logs in CloudWatch dashboards.
author: alex380125

title: UP-1473 database bootstrap commands
summary: Added automated database bootstrap commands to create the `upsolve` and `spicedb` databases on startup, replacing manual initialization scripts with an idempotent Python-based approach. Upgraded upsolve to version 0.0.7 to enable x86 architecture support and removed hard-coded Grafana container naming to prevent conflicts.
userImpact: Database initialization now happens automatically on first run without requiring manual SQL scripts, and the system can now run on x86 architectures with upsolve support.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1230-bugfix: Gate upsolve bootstrap step behind flag
summary: Added a feature flag to conditionally gate the upsolve bootstrap step, allowing operators to skip the db-patches step when needed. The flag is controlled via environment variable and can be configured in docker-compose, CloudFormation templates, and application settings.
userImpact: Operators can now disable the upsolve bootstrap step by setting the feature flag to false, preventing unwanted database patch execution during initialization.
author: alex380125

title: Update all non-major dependencies
summary: Updated non-major dependencies to their latest minor versions: authzed/spicedb from v1.35.3 to v1.36.2 and cfn-lint from ~=1.14.0 to ~=1.15.0. This brings in the latest improvements and bug fixes from these dependencies while maintaining backward compatibility.
userImpact: Users benefit from the latest improvements and security fixes in authzed/spicedb and cfn-lint without breaking changes.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: Draft: UP-1231: CFT for upsolve
summary: Added CloudFormation Templates (CFT) for deploying Upsolve as a containerized service on ECS. This includes new ECS task definitions, security groups, load balancer configuration, secrets management integration, and CI/CD pipeline setup for building and pushing the Upsolve Docker image to ECR.
userImpact: Infrastructure operators can now deploy and manage Upsolve infrastructure using CloudFormation templates, enabling infrastructure-as-code deployment practices and consistent multi-environment provisioning.
author: alex380125

title: [no-ref] fix app start up
summary: Fixed a ModuleNotFoundError that prevented the app from starting up during import of the permissions router. The issue was a missing module reference that was introduced in a recent change. The import path in permissions_router.py has been corrected to resolve the startup failure.
userImpact: The application now starts up successfully without ModuleNotFoundError exceptions.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1471: Fix timestamp typo
summary: Fixed a typo in the API model timestamp field across the data retrieval module. The typo was corrected in the API model definition, router, and corresponding unit tests to ensure consistency and prevent runtime errors.
userImpact: API requests and responses involving timestamp fields in data retrieval operations now use the correct field name.
author: peter496

title: UP-1471 - Include status and nulled body on GET retrieved data if not loaded.
summary: Modified the GET data retrieval endpoint to include a status field and return a nulled body when data has not yet been loaded or has expired. This change simplifies state management by making the response model more explicit about data availability at the router level, allowing clients to better understand the retrieval state without additional queries.
userImpact: Users can now poll the data retrieval endpoint and receive an explicit status field indicating data availability, with null bodies for unavailable data, enabling more reliable state-driven client logic.
author: peter496

title: NO-REF: Add flags to prevent recursive API models from getting split into input / output
summary: Added flags to FastAPI server configuration to prevent recursive API models from being automatically split into separate Input/Output variants in OpenAPI documentation. This addresses a complex FastAPI behavior where certain combinations of field properties (nullability, defaults) and response_model annotations cause duplicate model definitions, eliminating the need for manual serialization workarounds.
userImpact: API consumers can now define recursive models without worrying about unexpected Input/Output type splitting in OpenAPI specifications.
author: peter496

title: UP-897 | Add permissions check endpoint
summary: Adds a new `/api/v1/permissions/check` endpoint that allows checking permissions for a given resource and permission name in a single bulk operation. This endpoint validates multiple permissions against a resource ID efficiently, eliminating the need for multiple round trips to SpiceDB.
userImpact: Users can now programmatically check whether specific permissions are allowed for a resource via the new permissions check endpoint, enabling more efficient permission validation workflows.
author: ooizig

title: UP-1314 | Add project level jobs filtering based on model_id
summary: This MR adds project-level job filtering based on the model_id field. It introduces a new mechanism to dynamically filter job spec subclasses that have a model_id defined, eliminating the need for manual registration of new model-specific jobs as they're created.
userImpact: Users can now filter jobs at the project level by model_id, with automatic detection of model-specific job types without requiring code updates for each new job variant.
author: ooizig

title: Update dependency anyio to ~=4.6.0
summary: Updated the anyio dependency from ~=4.5.0 to ~=4.6.0, bringing fixes for CPU usage issues and cancel scope propagation in asyncio. This minor release resolves several edge cases in task group and cancel scope handling that could cause high CPU utilization and inconsistent cancellation behavior.
userImpact: Applications using asyncio task groups and cancel scopes will experience improved stability with reduced CPU usage and more consistent cancellation semantics.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1212 UP-1213 | FetchData job execution
summary: This MR implements FetchData job execution for data retrieval operations, adding the ability to submit, track, and manage asynchronous data fetch jobs across models. It includes job specification models, updated API endpoints for data retrieval, enhanced connectors with filtering and pagination support, and comprehensive authorization controls via SpiceDB to prevent cross-model data access.
userImpact: Users can now submit and execute FetchData jobs to retrieve data from configured connectors, with support for filtering, pagination, and per-model isolation of data retrieval operations.
author: ooizig

title: [no-ref] add call flow diagram for raw data retrieval job
summary: Added a call flow diagram to the Raw Data Retrieval technical documentation to clarify how the raw data retrieval job works. This improves internal documentation for developers working with or maintaining the raw data retrieval system.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1387 fix CFT secret IAM access
summary: Fixed IAM access policy for ECS task execution role to retrieve secrets from AWS Secrets Manager. The task execution role was missing the `secretsmanager:GetSecretValue` permission, preventing tasks from pulling required secrets during initialization.
userImpact: ECS tasks can now successfully authenticate to and retrieve secrets from AWS Secrets Manager without AccessDeniedException errors.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1387 move root user credentials to a secret
summary: Fixed failing ECS task definition deployment by moving root user credentials into AWS Secrets Manager instead of referencing a non-existent secret. The previous configuration referenced an invalid Systems Manager parameter name that exceeded or violated AWS naming constraints, causing CloudFormation deployment failures.
userImpact: Deployments now succeed without the Systems Manager parameter validation error when creating ECS task definitions with root user credentials.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1387 add configurations for missing bootstrap params
summary: The ECS bootstrap task was missing environment variables for the data plane client secret, and the CloudFormation stack was missing parameters for root user bootstrapping. This change adds the necessary configurations to both the app-plane and data-plane ECS task definitions and the root scope CloudFormation template to enable proper bootstrap initialization.
userImpact: Bootstrap initialization for ECS deployments now succeeds with all required environment variables and CloudFormation parameters properly configured.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-1387 fix ECS entrypoint for latest bootstrap command
summary: The ECS entrypoint configuration was using an outdated bootstrap script reference. This fix updates the start command in the CloudFormation template to use the latest bootstrap command, resolving the mismatch introduced in a previous change.
userImpact: ECS deployments now start correctly with the current bootstrap script instead of failing due to outdated command references.
author: ianmcgraw

title: Update dependency Faker to v29
summary: Updated the Faker test dependency from v28 to v29. This update includes a fix for `pydecimal` distribution when called with a range across zero, improving the reliability of decimal value generation in tests.
userImpact: No direct user impact.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: Update dependency anyio to ~=4.5.0
summary: Updated anyio dependency from ~=4.4.0 to ~=4.5.0, bringing performance improvements to Lock and Semaphore on asyncio (up to 50%), new Python 3.13 compatibility features in anyio.Path, expanded subprocess argument support, and several bug fixes including fixes for asyncio subprocess handling and task cancellation detection.
userImpact: Users benefit from improved async lock/semaphore performance, support for Python 3.13 path methods, enhanced subprocess functionality, and fixes for edge cases in subprocess handling and task cancellation.
author: group_3720083_bot_bf89c4e378f22b6cb8b2f93b06d47dae

title: UP-1230: docker-compose set up for upsolve
summary: Added docker-compose setup for the Upsolve service with PostgreSQL initialization scripts and database patch bootstrapping. This enables local development of Upsolve alongside the app-plane service in a containerized environment with proper database initialization and connectivity between services.
userImpact: Developers can now run Upsolve locally using docker-compose with automatic database initialization and bootstrap jobs, streamlining the local development workflow.
author: alex380125

title: UP-1346 - Correctly update latest_run_start update
summary: Fixed a bug where `latest_run_start` was not being updated when a job transitioned to running state. The field is an internal implementation detail excluded from API models, but it must be set to the current time on every transition to running status.
userImpact: Jobs now correctly track their latest run start time, ensuring accurate internal state management for job execution monitoring.
author: peter496

title: UP-1467 - Dashboard updates
summary: The MVP Shield dashboard has been updated with a new inference count over time visualization and improved chart clarity. Sensitive data rule charts now include more descriptive titles and corrected axis labels for better readability and understanding of the data.
userImpact: Users can now track inference trends over time with the new visualization and better understand sensitive data rule metrics through improved chart labeling.
author: peter496

title: UP-4347 Dont color noninteractable rule names
summary: Fixed an issue where non-interactive rule names were being colored when they should not be. The change removes unnecessary styling from rule names in the compliant rules and needs attention sections of the policy detail modal.
userImpact: Rule names that are not interactive now display without color styling, improving visual clarity in the policy governance interface.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4326 Make apps list scrollable in policy modal
summary: Made the apps list scrollable in the policy assignment modal to improve usability when dealing with a large number of applications. This prevents the modal from becoming overly tall and ensures better UI/UX when assigning policies to multiple apps.
userImpact: Users can now scroll through a long list of applications in the policy modal without the modal exceeding viewport height.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: fix(UP-4325): avoid skeleton overlay during infinite-scroll pagination in check history
summary: Fixed a visual issue where the skeleton loading overlay would persist during infinite-scroll pagination in the check history compliance checks tab. The fix prevents the skeleton from displaying on top of new paginated content, improving the user experience when scrolling through historical compliance checks.
userImpact: Users will no longer see a skeleton overlay blocking content when scrolling through paginated compliance check history.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4181): add "No Data in 7 Days" alert rule template
summary: Added a new "No Data in 7 Days" alert rule template to the governance alert rules system. Users can now quickly create alerts that trigger when no data is received within a 7-day period. The implementation includes a configurable interval UI that allows customization of alert rule timing.
userImpact: Users can now use the "No Data in 7 Days" pre-built alert template to automatically detect periods of missing data without manual configuration.
author: lukasz94

title: feat: add custom range to attestation rule validity period
summary: Added support for custom date ranges when setting the validity period of attestation rules. A new ValidityPeriodSelect component now allows users to define flexible validity windows rather than relying on predefined options, improving the configuration flexibility of policy attestation rules.
userImpact: Users can now set custom date ranges for attestation rule validity periods, providing greater control over policy compliance scheduling.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4321 Add missing metrics calculation schedule configuration warning
summary: Added a warning notification when metrics calculation schedule configuration is missing from an application's governance policies. The warning appears in the policies overview section to alert users to this required configuration, improving application setup completeness tracking.
userImpact: Users now see a clear warning when their application is missing metrics calculation schedule configuration in governance policies, helping them identify and resolve this setup requirement.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4329 Adjust policy assignment fetching
summary: Refactored policy assignment fetching to use infinite query patterns for better performance and pagination handling. Added a new hook (usePolicyAssignmentsInfinite) and updated the apps-governed-tab component to leverage improved API request patterns, reducing unnecessary fetches and improving the user experience when viewing large numbers of policy assignments.
userImpact: Users can now browse policy assignments more efficiently with improved pagination and reduced load times when viewing large datasets in the governance policies interface.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Add typecheck scripts
summary: Added typecheck scripts to the repository configuration across multiple package.json files and turbo.json to enable automated type checking. Removed the unused `promptSaveState` utility file which was causing type errors and was duplicated in other packages (arthur-engine).
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4048 New Project redirect
summary: Retires the standalone `/projects/:id` landing page and redirects to the workspace-scoped applications view at `/workspaces/<wsId>/applications?project=<id>`. Centralizes project-creation permission gating by reading `WorkspacePermissions.canCreateProject` in the `NewProjectModalProvider` and hiding "Create project" entry points when users lack permission. Updates the empty-state experience to show a contextual message when no creation actions are available.
userImpact: Users are now redirected from the legacy project page to the unified workspace applications view, and workspace admins can control who can create projects with clearer permission-based UI feedback.
author: martin452

title: UP-4338 Make the stepper header sticky in policy creation flow
summary: The stepper header in the policy creation flow is now sticky, remaining visible as users scroll through each step. This improves navigation and context awareness by keeping the progress indicator in view at all times. Changes were applied across all policy creation step components to ensure consistent behavior throughout the flow.
userImpact: Users can now see the policy creation progress step indicator at all times while scrolling through form content, improving navigation and reducing the need to scroll back up to reference their current position.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4334 Ensure properly displaying webhook in edit policy modal
summary: Fixed incorrect display of webhook configuration in the edit policy modal. The modal was not properly rendering webhook details when editing an existing governance policy, which has now been corrected.
userImpact: Users can now correctly view and edit webhook settings when modifying governance policies in the edit policy modal.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4337 Unify status badges
summary: Unified status badge components across the application by consolidating JobStatus and JobStatusBadge into a single reusable StatusBadge component in the shared-components package. This removes code duplication and provides a consistent status display pattern for jobs, policies, and governance features throughout the UI.
userImpact: Status badges now display consistently across jobs, policies, and compliance checks with improved maintainability and a unified visual approach.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4327): update current violations widget on policy overview
summary: Updated the current violations widget on the policy overview page with several improvements: capped the violations table to 5 rows for better performance, added an "All applications" filter option, and refactored to use ComplianceStatusBadge and react-router Link components for consistency.
userImpact: Users can now see a more concise violations table on policy overview, filter violations by all applications, and navigate using standard link components.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4325): improve loading state in check history table
summary: Fixed loading state display in the check history table on the compliance checks tab. This change improves the user experience by ensuring the loading indicator is properly rendered when the table is fetching previous checks data.
userImpact: Users now see the correct loading state indicator when the compliance check history table is loading data.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4324): add sidebar trigger on Agent Discovery page
summary: Added a sidebar trigger control to the Agent Discovery page (Governance view) to allow users to open/close the sidebar from within the page. This provides quick access to sidebar functionality without navigating away from the Agent Discovery interface.
userImpact: Users can now toggle the sidebar directly from the Agent Discovery page for improved navigation and workflow efficiency.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4336): shorten pending compliance status to "Evaluating"
summary: Updated the pending compliance status display text from a longer label to the shorter "Evaluating" for improved UI clarity. This change applies to the governance module's status messaging.
userImpact: Users will see a more concise "Evaluating" status label when viewing pending compliance evaluations.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4328): rename compliance checks filter to "Rule Type"
summary: The compliance checks filter in the governance policies section has been renamed to "Rule Type" for improved clarity and consistency with domain terminology. This change updates both the UI label and related localization strings to better reflect the filter's purpose.
userImpact: Users will now see the compliance checks filter labeled as "Rule Type" instead of the previous label, making the governance policy interface more intuitive.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4240 icon loading bug
summary: Fixed a CORS error that prevented icons from loading properly in the AWS console installation method. Instead of proxying the remote icon, the application now uses a locally downloaded version of the CloudFormation launch stack button icon.
userImpact: Users can now see the CloudFormation launch stack button icon without encountering CORS errors during the AWS onboarding process.
author: martin452

title: fix(UP-3445): remove active/inactive engines tabs
summary: Removed the active/inactive engines tabs from the engines management UI. The previous client-side filtering approach was buggy and unreliable; this workaround removes the tabs until server-side filtering can be properly implemented.
userImpact: Users will no longer see the active/inactive engine tabs, eliminating confusion from the buggy client-side filtering behavior.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4268): surface actionable attestation submission errors
summary: Improved error handling in the attestation submission flow to surface actionable error messages to users. When attestation submission fails, users now receive clear, user-friendly error feedback instead of generic responses, enabling them to understand and resolve issues more effectively.
userImpact: Users now see actionable error messages when attestation submission fails, making it easier to diagnose and resolve submission issues.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4267): governance UX blue text, rule link, stale tab
summary: Fixed governance UX issues including incorrect blue text styling, missing rule links in policy detail modals, and stale tab states. Changes ensure the policy ID is properly passed through the needs attention section and compliance checks display correct data references.
userImpact: Users can now see properly styled governance policy details with functional rule links and up-to-date tab states.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4235 Add polling to checks page to properly handle ongoing attestations
summary: Added polling mechanism to the checks page to properly track and display the status of ongoing attestations in real-time. This ensures users see current attestation states without manual page refreshes, improving the governance workflow experience.
userImpact: Users can now see attestation status updates live on the checks page as they progress, without needing to manually refresh.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Improve claude md by adding useEffect rules
summary: Added useEffect rules to CLAUDE.md to improve documentation and guidance for developers. This update provides clearer instructions for working with React's useEffect hook within the codebase, helping ensure consistent patterns and best practices across the frontend application.
userImpact: Developers now have documented useEffect rules and best practices to follow when working with React hooks in the codebase.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4217: Improve compliance jobs widget error/status handling
summary: Improved error and status handling in the compliance jobs widget to provide clearer feedback to users. Enhanced the check-status widget, job-status badge, and compliance context to better surface job states and errors, with updated UI text and refined logic in the compliance jobs hook.
userImpact: Users now see improved error messages and status indicators when compliance jobs run, making it easier to understand job outcomes and troubleshoot issues.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat: add filters to policies list page (UP-4244)
summary: Added Status, Owner, and Application filter dropdowns to the Policies list page, following the existing Checks page pattern. The filters leverage the `usePolicies` hook with new filter parameters (`owner_group_id`, `compliance_status`, `model_id`) and fetch groups and models from existing API clients. Translation strings have been added for the new filter UI.
userImpact: Users can now filter policies by compliance status, owner group, and application, and combine filters with search to more easily find relevant policies.
author: videetparekh1995

title: [no-ref] update trace table to accept row selection props
summary: Updated the trace table component to accept row selection props, extending the useTable hook and TracesTable component. This enables callers to configure row selection behavior on the trace table without modifying the core component logic.
userImpact: Users can now configure row selection behavior for trace tables by passing selection props to the TracesTable component.
author: ianmcgraw

title: feat(UP-4247): Add server-side sorting to governance checks grid
summary: Added server-side sorting capability to the governance checks grid. Users can now sort governance checks directly from the grid interface, with sorting handled server-side for improved performance and consistency across large datasets.
userImpact: Users can now sort governance checks by clicking column headers in the governance checks grid, with sorting performed server-side for better scalability.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4248): make the table full size
summary: Modified the governance checks table layout to utilize the full available width. This improves space utilization and readability in the governance checks view by allowing the table to expand to fill its container.
userImpact: The checks table in the governance section now displays at full width, providing better visibility and a more spacious layout.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4238): refactor the edit attestation form
summary: Refactored the edit attestation form to improve code organization and maintainability. The changes restructure components in the policy attestation rule flow and introduce stronger type definitions to reduce type assertions and enhance type safety.
userImpact: No direct user impact—internal refactoring improves code quality and maintainability.
author: lukasz94

title: Fix bg color of policy card rule badges
summary: Fixed the background color of policy card rule badges in the governance policies view. The visual styling issue was corrected in the policy card component.
userImpact: Policy card rule badges now display with the correct background color in the governance policies interface.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Make resizable code editor scrollable, fix panel collapsing logic
summary: Fixed scrollability in the resizable code editor component and corrected the panel collapsing logic. Added a new useFocusWithin hook to better manage focus state during interactions, and updated the alert rule dialog to properly handle these changes.
userImpact: Users can now scroll content within resizable code editors, and panels collapse correctly without unexpected behavior.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4220: Add policy dashboard to policy page
summary: A new policy dashboard has been added to the policy page, providing users with enhanced visibility into policy metrics and analytics. The dashboard component integrates with existing dashboard infrastructure and includes updated governance UI labels to support the new feature.
userImpact: Users can now view a comprehensive dashboard on the policy page with analytics and key metrics for better policy monitoring and management.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4236): add new loading state
summary: Added a new loading state to the governance checks view. This enhancement improves the user experience by providing better visual feedback during data loading operations in the workspace governance checks interface.
userImpact: Users will now see an improved loading indicator when governance checks are being retrieved.
author: lukasz94

title: feat: revalidate checks after attestation
summary: Added automatic revalidation of compliance checks after an attestation is created. This ensures that check states remain consistent and reflect the impact of the newly recorded attestation without requiring a manual refresh.
userImpact: Users no longer need to manually refresh the compliance checks view after attesting to a policy; checks are automatically revalidated to show the current state.
author: lukasz94

title: fix: app routes last pass
summary: Fixed app routes configuration to correct routing behavior. Changes include adjustments to AppRoutes component and updates to governance-related views to ensure proper route linking and navigation throughout the application.
userImpact: Users will experience correct application routing and proper navigation between workspace governance pages and policy management sections.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4223 Add previous checks section to compliance checks tab
summary: Added a new "Previous Checks" section to the compliance checks tab in governance policies, displaying historical check results alongside current violations. This enhancement provides users with visibility into past compliance check execution and outcomes, improving audit trail tracking and compliance monitoring capabilities.
userImpact: Users can now view a history of previous compliance checks in the compliance checks tab, enabling better tracking of policy compliance over time.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4225): add hasChanges check
summary: Added a hasChanges check to the SelectApplicationsStep component in the AssignPolicyModal. This validation improves the reliability of the policy assignment workflow by ensuring changes are properly tracked before proceeding.
userImpact: Users can now proceed through the policy assignment modal with more reliable change detection, preventing accidental submission without modifications.
author: lukasz94

title: feat: refactor applications routing
summary: Refactored the applications routing structure to flatten routes from `/:projectId/:applicationId` to `/:applicationId`, simplifying the URL hierarchy. Updated breadcrumbs and all related component paths to align with the new routing structure.
userImpact: Users will experience simpler, more direct URLs when navigating to applications, and breadcrumb navigation has been updated to reflect the flattened route structure.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4216): add checks view
summary: Introduces a new Checks view in the governance section that displays compliance checks with server-side filtering, infinite scroll pagination, and search capabilities. The view integrates with the workspace compliance API, includes navigation links to associated policies and rules, and provides row-level action menus for managing checks.
userImpact: Users can now view and search through compliance checks in the governance workspace with filtering, navigation to related policies/rules, and actionable controls for each check.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4212, UP-4213 Fix loading spinner behavior in compliance checks tab
summary: Fixed loading spinner behavior in the compliance checks tab for policy governance. Added a new useAttestationTracking hook and updated the current violations section and overview tab to properly handle loading state display during compliance check operations.
userImpact: The loading spinner now displays correctly in the compliance checks tab, providing accurate visual feedback while compliance checks are being processed.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4215): unify header on policy screen
summary: Unified the header styling on the policy screen to align with design standards. This change updates the policies list view component to use a consistent header treatment across the governance module.
userImpact: Users will see a visually consistent header on the policy screen that matches other screens in the application.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4204 Create the edit rule view for policy level alerts
summary: Added comprehensive edit and view flows for policy-level alert rules and attestation rules. The implementation introduces new dedicated UI components and pages for managing these rules within the policy context, reusing a shared AlertRuleEditForm component to streamline the editing experience across different rule types.
userImpact: Users can now edit and manage alert rules and attestation rules directly from the policy governance interface with dedicated views and forms.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4211): rebuild edit policy modal
summary: The edit policy modal has been rebuilt to improve its structure and maintainability. New dedicated step components were added for managing alert rules and attestation rules, replacing the previous inline implementations. This refactoring introduces a schema file and updates the modal's internal organization while maintaining visual parity.
userImpact: Users can now configure alert and attestation rules within an improved edit policy modal with better organized step-based interface.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4209): close and redirect on assignment click
summary: Updated the AssignmentSuccessContent component to close the policy assignment modal and redirect the user upon successful assignment. This improves the user experience by automatically advancing users to the next step in their workflow after completing a policy assignment action.
userImpact: Users are now automatically redirected after successfully assigning a policy, eliminating the need to manually close the modal.
author: lukasz94

title: Disable collapsibility in non-modal code editor views
summary: Disabled collapsibility in non-modal code editor views to prevent UI inconsistencies. The right panel in alert rule editing interfaces is now non-collapsible, ensuring a consistent user experience across both modal and non-modal view contexts.
userImpact: Users can no longer collapse the right panel in non-modal code editor views, ensuring a stable and predictable interface layout.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4210): add unstable name matching for alert and attestation rules
summary: Added unstable name matching functionality for alert and attestation rules in governance policies. This enhancement allows rules to match against unstable asset names, improving the flexibility of rule configuration across both the edit modal and rules tab interfaces.
userImpact: Users can now configure alert and attestation rules to match assets using unstable name matching, providing more granular control over policy enforcement.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4177 Fix attestation modal stale data
summary: Fixed stale data issues in the attestation modal across multiple governance UI components. The changes ensure that modal state is properly refreshed when displaying policy details and attestation dialogs, preventing cached or outdated information from being presented to users.
userImpact: Users will now see current and accurate attestation information in modals without requiring a page refresh to resolve stale data issues.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4183): add create new group sentinel element
summary: Adds a sentinel element to enable creation of new groups within the governance policies interface. This enhancement improves the user experience by providing a clear, dedicated interaction point for creating new groups in both the policy edit modal and the new policy details step.
userImpact: Users can now create new groups directly from the policy creation and editing interfaces using a dedicated sentinel element.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4149): add remove policy modal
summary: Added a new remove policy modal dialog that allows users to delete policies from the governance interface. The modal is now integrated into the policy management UI, with updated UI strings and refactored management button logic to leverage the new component.
userImpact: Users can now delete policies through a dedicated confirmation modal instead of inline removal, providing a safer and more intentional deletion workflow.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4182 Support multiline policy descriptions
summary: Added support for multiline policy descriptions in the policy editing and creation interfaces. Users can now write policy descriptions that span multiple lines in both the edit policy modal and the new policy details step.
userImpact: Users can now create and edit policy descriptions with multiple lines instead of being limited to single-line text.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4184: Collapse config sections for SQL queries in the editor
summary: Added the ability to collapse and expand config sections for SQL queries in the editor. New reusable components (`CodeEditorWithPanel`, `CollapsibleConfigSection`, `ValidationChecklist`) were introduced and integrated across alert rule configuration views and webhook/custom aggregation forms to improve the editor UI and user experience when working with SQL queries.
userImpact: Users can now collapse config sections in SQL query editors for a cleaner, more organized interface when configuring alert rules, webhooks, and custom aggregations.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4205): add application rename
summary: Added application rename functionality to the application views. Users can now rename applications within the workspace, with UI updates across the application detail page and governance layout to support this new capability.
userImpact: Users can now rename applications directly from the application management interface.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4186): improve the empty state when there are no violations
summary: Improved the empty state UI when there are no violations displayed in the governance policies overview tab. This enhances the user experience by providing better visual feedback when no policy violations are present in the workspace.
userImpact: Users now see an improved empty state message when viewing a policy with no violations, making it clearer that the absence of violations is the expected state.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4187): update UI to match Figma
summary: Updated UI components in the policy detail modal and overview pages to match the latest Figma design specifications. Changes were made across multiple policy-related views including compliant rules section, needs attention section, and policy overview tab.
userImpact: Users now see the policy governance interface with updated visual styling that matches current design standards.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4167): change application redirect
summary: Updated application redirect behavior in the governance policies UI. The change modifies the columns component in the apps-governed tab and updates the OpenAPI schema to reflect the new redirect target, improving the navigation flow for users managing governed applications.
userImpact: Users navigating from the governance policies interface will now be redirected to the updated application location.
author: lukasz94

title: Compliance checks widget refactor
summary: Refactored the compliance checks widget to use a separate endpoint for verifying check success/failure when checks are no longer ongoing. The new approach introduces additional API requests per assigned app (one-time only when checks complete), replacing the previous polling mechanism with a more targeted verification strategy.
userImpact: No direct user impact — internal refactor of compliance check status verification logic.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Add configurable dev server port via VITE_PORT env var
summary: The dev server port is now configurable via the VITE_PORT environment variable, with a default value of 3023. This enables multiple frontend stacks to run simultaneously on different ports without conflicts.
userImpact: Developers can now set the VITE_PORT environment variable to run the frontend dev server on a custom port, allowing multiple instances to coexist during local development.
author: videetparekh1995

title: feat: add schedule_compliance_jobs and compliance_policy_check job kinds
summary: Added two new job kinds to the system: `schedule_compliance_jobs` (a scheduler meta-job) and `compliance_policy_check` (a user-visible job type). Both kinds have been added to the JobKind enum, with translation labels provided for UI displays. The scheduler meta-job is excluded from job tables and filter dropdowns to maintain consistency with similar internal scheduling jobs.
userImpact: Users can now view and manage compliance policy check jobs in the system, while scheduler meta-jobs remain hidden from regular job views.
author: videetparekh1995

title: feat: fix scroll and add info alert
summary: Fixed scroll behavior and added an info alert component to the governance policies view. The changes improve the user experience in the policy management interface by addressing scrolling issues and providing informational feedback through alert notifications.
userImpact: Users can now experience improved scrolling behavior in the governance policies view and see informational alerts when managing policies.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4175 Keep previous search results while waiting for response
summary: Fixed an issue where search results were cleared while waiting for a new response in the Select Applications step of the Assign Policy modal. The application now preserves the previous search results during loading, providing a better user experience when searching policies.
userImpact: Users will no longer see search results disappear while waiting for a new response when searching for applications in the policy assignment workflow.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4172 Add action column to the needs attention section of application level policy modal
summary: Added an action column to the needs attention section of the application level policy modal in the governance view. This provides users with actionable controls directly within the needs attention table, improving the workflow for managing policy compliance issues.
userImpact: Users can now take actions directly from the needs attention section of the policy detail modal without leaving the view.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: fix(UP-4174): when options dropdown is clicked for the first time it disappears
summary: Fixed an issue where the options dropdown would disappear when clicked for the first time in governance views. The fix involved refactoring row action handling across alert rules, attestation rules, and policy-governed apps components, with improved state management and error handling for modal interactions.
userImpact: Users can now reliably click the options dropdown menu in governance governance tables without it disappearing on first interaction.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4164, UP-4170: Mutate policies data after app assignment
summary: Fixed a data mutation issue in the policy assignment modal to ensure policies data is properly updated after an app is assigned. The fix mutates the policies data in the AssignPolicyModal component to prevent stale state and maintain UI consistency.
userImpact: Users can now see correctly updated policy data immediately after assigning policies to an app without requiring a manual refresh.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4165: Simply navigate on view policy button press
summary: Fixed navigation behavior on the "View Policy" button press in the assignment success modal. The fix simplifies the navigation logic by removing unnecessary code, ensuring users are properly directed after viewing a policy assignment.
userImpact: Users can now correctly navigate away from the policy assignment success screen when pressing the "View Policy" button.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4161 Properly store custom rules created by the user
summary: Fixed an issue where custom rules created by users in the governance policies workflow were not being properly stored. The fix addresses storage handling in both alert rules and attestation rules steps, ensuring user-created rules persist correctly.
userImpact: Users can now create and save custom alert and attestation rules in governance policies without losing their configurations.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4166 Consider existing assignments in edit assignment modal
summary: The edit assignment modal now correctly considers existing policy assignments when calculating available options. This fix prevents users from inadvertently creating duplicate or conflicting assignments when modifying existing policy assignments in governance workflows.
userImpact: Users can now edit policy assignments without the modal suggesting applications or configurations that are already assigned, avoiding duplicate assignments.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4103): add edit modal
summary: Added an edit modal for governance policies that enables users to modify alert rules and attestation rules within a single unified interface. The implementation includes new modal components, custom hooks for creating rules, and updated translations to support the new editing functionality.
userImpact: Users can now edit alert rules and attestation rules within governance policies through a dedicated edit modal interface.
author: lukasz94

title: Policies bugfixes
summary: Fixed missing onClick handlers on buttons and menu items throughout the policies governance interface, and improved the compliance checks snackbar to retain successful check information instead of disappearing immediately. These changes affect alert rules, attestation rules, policy management, and compliance checking across multiple governance views.
userImpact: Users can now interact with previously non-functional buttons and menu items in governance policies, and successful compliance check results will persist in the snackbar notification instead of vanishing instantly.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Application policies flow
summary: Added a new policy details modal to the application details page in the governance section, allowing users to view comprehensive policy information. The implementation includes a compliant rules section and a needs-attention section, while fixing rendering of the policies section to work across all application kinds and improving the loading state presentation.
userImpact: Users can now click into individual policies to view detailed compliance information, compliant rules, and any policies requiring attention in a dedicated modal interface.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4143: Policy overview tab
summary: A new policy overview tab has been added to the policy management interface, providing users with a dedicated view for policy details and information. The feature includes a new overview component, supporting i18n translations, and is integrated into the existing policy detail page.
userImpact: Users can now access a dedicated overview tab when viewing a specific policy, providing better organization and visibility of policy information.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat: policies in apps
summary: Added policies section to the application view, allowing users to manage alert and attestation rules directly from the applications governance interface. The change includes new modals for adding rules, shared rule templates to reduce duplication, and integration with the policies management system.
userImpact: Users can now view and manage policies (alert and attestation rules) within the application governance view, with a dedicated policies section and simplified rule creation modals.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4152 Compliance check page
summary: Added a new Compliance Checks tab to the governance policies page, allowing users to view and manage compliance violations and attestations. The tab includes a current violations section with detailed columns and an attest dialog for acknowledging or resolving violations. Also fixed a type error in the apps governed tab and corrected policy flow templates.
userImpact: Users can now access a dedicated Compliance Checks tab within policy details to view current violations and create attestations for governance compliance management.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4142): add check widget
summary: Added a new check widget component to the governance policies interface, providing visibility into compliance check status. The implementation includes check status display, job status badges, and a management button to control compliance checks, alongside refactored action button placement and updated i18n strings for the governance domain.
userImpact: Users can now see the status of compliance checks on policies through a dedicated widget and manage compliance check jobs directly from the policy view.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4012, UP-4147: Add attestation rules and alert rules views
summary: Added new UI views for managing attestation rules and alert rules within the governance section. These new views provide dedicated interfaces for users to configure and view both attestation and alert rules, with corresponding data columns and internationalization support for English.
userImpact: Users can now access and manage attestation rules and alert rules through dedicated governance views in the application.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Pin all unify and shared components deps
summary: Dependencies for Unify and shared components packages have been pinned to specific versions in package.json and yarn.lock. This ensures consistent and reproducible builds across environments by locking all transitive dependencies.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: Feat: Policies
summary: Implements a complete governance policies feature enabling users to create, view, manage, and assign policies to applications. The feature includes a multi-step policy creation flow with details, alert rules, attestation rules, and confirmation pages, as well as policy detail views with tabs for managing rules and viewing governed applications.
userImpact: Users can now create governance policies with custom alert and attestation rules, assign them to applications, and manage policy-governed apps through a dedicated policies interface in the governance section.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4088 alert rules navigation 500 error
summary: Fixed an intermittent 500 error that occurred when clicking "Back to Alerts" on the Alert Rules Management page after a second visit to an application. The root cause was stale projectId left in the global store when resolveEntity failures occurred in modelLoader and alertRuleLoader — both now clear projectId alongside workspaceId on failure to maintain consistency.
userImpact: Users can now reliably navigate back from Alert Rules Management to an application's alerts tab without encountering a 500 error, even on repeated visits.
author: martin452

title: UP-4097, UP-4098, UP-4100: Implement policy assignment to app flow
summary: Implemented a complete policy assignment flow for applications, allowing users to assign governance policies to apps through a multi-step modal. The implementation includes selecting target applications, reviewing the assignment, and confirming successful policy assignment with appropriate UI states and internationalization support.
userImpact: Users can now assign governance policies to applications directly from the policy card, streamlining the policy management workflow.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4101): policy list and details
summary: Added a new policy list view and policy details page with comprehensive governance management capabilities. The implementation includes tabs for viewing associated applications and policy rules (alert and attestation), along with custom hooks for data fetching and mutations. UI improvements include z-index stacking fixes and a confirmation modal for unassigning applications.
userImpact: Users can now browse policies, view detailed policy information including governed applications and associated rules, and manage policy assignments through an improved UI.
author: lukasz94

title: Policy creation flow feedback
summary: Implemented feedback improvements to the policy creation flow based on demo feedback. Changes enhance the user experience across multiple steps including alert rules, attestation rules, and the confirmation step with improved validation, messaging, and visual feedback.
userImpact: Users creating policies now experience improved feedback, clearer validation messages, and better guidance throughout the policy creation workflow.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4128 add new mappings for compliance job
summary: Added new mappings and API specification for a new compliance job type. The changes include localization strings in i18n configuration files and updates to the OpenAPI specification to support the new job type.
userImpact: Users can now create and work with the new compliance job type within the application.
author: ianmcgraw

title: Integrate new policy flow with real endpoints
summary: Integrated the new policy creation flow with real backend endpoints, replacing mock dialogs with streamlined components. Dead code has been removed and the policy workflow (alert rules, attestation rules, and confirmations) has been refactored to connect directly to actual API calls.
userImpact: Users can now create governance policies with real backend integration, with a simplified and more responsive policy creation interface.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: fix(UP-4075): change redirect links
summary: Updated redirect links in the add new modal and NotFound page components. These changes fix broken or incorrect redirect URLs that were causing navigation issues in the application.
userImpact: Users will now be redirected to the correct URLs when accessing the add new modal or landing on a not-found page.
author: lukasz94

title: [no-ref] set renovate bot minimumReleaseAge 3 days
summary: Configured Renovate bot to enforce a 3-day minimum delay before upgrading packages. This provides a safety window for package maintainers to revoke malicious versions before they are automatically upgraded in this project.
userImpact: No direct user impact
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-4095, UP-4096 Implement create new policy confirmation page mocks + success modal
summary: Added a confirmation step to the new policy creation flow with a dedicated confirmation page mock and success modal. The UI now guides users through a multi-step process that includes policy details entry followed by a confirmation review before final submission.
userImpact: Users can now review their policy settings on a confirmation page before creating a new policy, with visual confirmation upon successful creation.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat: implement step 3 of new policy creation
summary: Implemented step 3 of the new policy creation flow, adding attestation rules functionality. This includes new UI components for adding and managing attestation rules, along with dialogs for creating rules from scratch or selecting existing ones.
userImpact: Users can now create and configure attestation rules as part of the new policy creation workflow.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: UP-4089, UP-4093: Implement step 2 of new policy flow, improve webhook selection and add rule creation modal
summary: Implements step 2 of the new policy flow, allowing users to configure alert rules within the policy creation workflow. Adds a modal for rule creation from scratch and improves webhook selection UI with better display and filtering options. These changes enhance the policy configuration experience and complete the multi-step policy setup interface.
userImpact: Users can now configure alert rules in step 2 of the policy creation flow, with options to create new rules from scratch or select existing ones, and improved webhook selection functionality.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: [no-ref] fix eval selector type to search
summary: Fixed eval selector type to search by bumping the shared-components package version. This update resolves a type-related issue in the eval selector functionality that was addressed in the upstream shared-components package.
userImpact: Users will have the corrected eval selector type behavior for search functionality when using the updated shared-components package.
author: ianmcgraw

title: [no-ref] fix eval selector to search on type
summary: The eval selector component was limited to displaying only the top 10 evaluators, preventing users from accessing evaluators outside that initial set. This fix enables type-to-search functionality to discover and display evaluators beyond the top 10 results, improving accessibility of the full evaluator catalog.
userImpact: Users can now search for and select evaluators that fall outside the initial top 10 results in the eval selector dropdown.
author: ianmcgraw

title: UP-4078 Implement details step mocks for new policy creation
summary: Implements the details step UI and mock infrastructure for new policy creation in the governance module. Adds new components including SelectPopover, WebhookCreationDialog, and a complete details step form with localization strings for the policy creation workflow.
userImpact: Users can now access the details step interface when creating new policies, with webhook selection and related configuration options available through the new UI components.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-3884): add missing name of project in which model is created
summary: Added display of project name where a model is created, improving clarity in the applications interface. This change enhances the user experience by making it explicit which project a model belongs to, alongside updates to agent-related components and removal of deprecated overview sections.
userImpact: Users can now see the project name associated with each model created, providing better context and organization within the applications view.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4049): change CTA text
summary: Updated Call-To-Action (CTA) text across multiple UI components and localization files. Changes span alerts, applications, engines management, organization management, projects, webhooks, and workspace features to improve clarity and user guidance.
userImpact: Users will see updated button and action text labels throughout the application interface, providing clearer instructions for key interactions.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4045): add entity icons store
summary: Added a centralized entity icons store to standardize icon usage across the application. This new store provides consistent access to entity-specific icons used throughout the UI components, reducing duplication and improving maintainability of icon definitions.
userImpact: Users benefit from consistent entity icon styling and behavior across the application, while developers gain a centralized location to manage and reference entity icons.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-4066): fix redirect
summary: Fixed a redirect issue in the job detail view. The change removes unnecessary redirect logic (4 lines removed, 1 line added) that was causing incorrect navigation behavior in the jobs/:id/job.tsx component.
userImpact: Users navigating to job detail pages will now redirect correctly without encountering the previous broken redirect behavior.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4074): show snackbar on email copy
summary: Added a snackbar notification that appears when users copy an email address. This improves user feedback by confirming the copy action was successful with a visual toast notification.
userImpact: Users now see a snackbar confirmation when copying an email address from the app settings.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4077: Policies page, empty state and governance sidenav
summary: Implemented a new Policies page within the Governance section with an empty state component and restructured the governance sidebar navigation. The governance module has been refactored to include dedicated subpage routing and improved layout organization for better navigation.
userImpact: Users can now access the Policies page from the Governance section, with a clear empty state guiding them when no policies are present.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: fix(UP-3873): close workspace selector after button click
summary: The workspace selector dropdown now properly closes after a user clicks a workspace button to select it. Previously, the dropdown remained open after selection, requiring an additional action to dismiss it.
userImpact: Users can now select a workspace from the dropdown and have it automatically close, improving the workflow efficiency.
author: lukasz94

title: feat:(UP-4056): update roles by entity view
summary: Updated roles management view to display role bindings by entity (organization, project, workspace). Introduced a new `useUserEffectiveRoleBindings` hook that fetches group bindings using SWR for improved performance and consistency across management table wrappers.
userImpact: Users can now view and manage user roles organized by entity type, with more efficient data fetching and clearer role binding visibility.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4063): move tools & models to governance
summary: Tools and Models navigation have been relocated from the Applications section to the Governance section. This reorganization updates routing, sidebar navigation, internationalization strings, and related component references to reflect the new information architecture, improving the logical grouping of governance-related features.
userImpact: Users can now access Tools and Models management through the Governance section instead of Applications, providing better alignment with governance workflows.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4069): new asset modal follow up UX changes
summary: Implemented follow-up UX improvements to the new asset modal, including refactoring the modal component structure, adding a project selector hook and component, and updating the create application modal. Changes include restructured add new asset modal logic, new shared project selector component, and updated i18n translations to support the improved interface.
userImpact: Users now have an improved asset creation experience with better UX flows and clearer project selection during the asset modal interactions.
author: lukasz94

title: UP-4064: Fetch model version data only when necessary
summary: Optimized model version data fetching to load only when necessary, reducing unnecessary API calls and improving application performance. Changes refactor data loading logic across multiple model and application pages to defer fetching until explicitly required.
userImpact: Users experience faster page loads and reduced API overhead when navigating model and application pages, as model version data is no longer fetched preemptively.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4050): update engine dropdown ux
summary: Updated the engine dropdown user experience in the New Project Modal with improved UI/UX interactions and localization strings. This change enhances the clarity and usability of engine selection during project creation.
userImpact: Users will see an improved engine dropdown interface when creating a new project, with better visual presentation and interaction patterns.
author: lukasz94

title: fix all applications tab constantly refreshing
summary: Fixed the All Applications tab constantly refreshing by adding a permissions check before attempting to fetch the applications list. Users without the required permission now see a permission denied message instead of experiencing repeated API calls, matching the behavior already implemented on the governance page.
userImpact: Users without applications list permissions no longer experience constant tab refreshing and instead see a clear permission denied message.
author: talerez

title: UP-4054 Truncate long text in sidenav and user context menu
summary: Added text truncation to the sidenav and user context menu to prevent long text from overflowing their containers. Changes were made to ProfileAvatar and sidebar components to apply CSS truncation styles, improving UI layout consistency.
userImpact: Long text in the sidenav and user context menu now displays cleanly with ellipsis instead of causing visual overflow.
author: artur-arthur-ai

title: feat(UP-4058): mutate after save
summary: Updated the EditCustomAggregation component to mutate the cache after saving a custom aggregation. This ensures that the UI immediately reflects the updated aggregation data without requiring a manual refresh. Comprehensive end-to-end tests and fixtures were added to validate the save and cache update behavior.
userImpact: Users will see custom aggregation changes immediately reflected in the UI after saving, without needing to manually refresh the page.
author: lukasz94

title: feat: bump base-ui library
summary: Updated the base-ui library dependency across multiple packages in the monorepo. This bump includes updates to shared-components, shield-types, and types packages with corresponding changelog entries.
userImpact: Users benefit from the latest base-ui library improvements and bug fixes integrated into the application.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-3324): profile & apps menu improvements
summary: Enhanced the profile avatar and apps menu components with improved UI/UX. Changes include refined styling in ProfileAvatar and AppSettings components, new Discord icon asset, and updated internationalization strings to support the new menu functionality.
userImpact: Users can now access improved profile and apps menu interfaces with better visual design and additional menu options.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4049): cta button styling
summary: Improved call-to-action button styling across the workspace and application creation UI. The changes include repositioning the "create new project" button, refactoring the create-application modal and sidebar components, and removing the now-deprecated new-application-menu component. This modernizes the interaction patterns for users setting up new applications.
userImpact: Users will see improved, more prominent call-to-action buttons for creating new projects and applications with better visual hierarchy and positioning.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4045): update project management drop down to combine all together
summary: The project management dropdown menu has been consolidated to combine multiple separate menu options into a single unified interface. This simplifies navigation and reduces clutter in the project settings UI while maintaining all existing functionality.
userImpact: Users now have a streamlined project management dropdown with combined menu options, making it easier to access project-level actions in a single location.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4052): add new asset modal
summary: Introduces a new asset modal component with role-based access control (RBAC) enforcement. The addNewModal component has been significantly enhanced with 184 lines of new functionality, and the AppSettings component has been migrated to use base-ui for improved consistency and maintainability.
userImpact: Users can now create new assets through an improved modal interface with proper permission controls that respect their role-based access level.
author: lukasz94

title: fix(UP-3870): add sidebar clip
summary: Added CSS clip property to the sidebar component to prevent content overflow and ensure proper visual containment. This is a small visual fix that improves the rendering of the sidebar in the workspace applications view.
userImpact: Users will see the sidebar properly clipped without overflow content extending beyond its boundaries.
author: lukasz94

title: feat(UP-4026): remove API Key entry from ml applications' management

title: feat: add auth checks to loaders

title: feat: add semantic contents field

title: feat: integrate with Upsolve API to handle custom dashboards

title: feat(UP-3885): match figma designs

title: feat(UP-3941): change create application modal in app settings

title: NO_REF - added transfer strategy

title: NO_REF - console error fix

userImpact: Users can now create custom metrics with simpler configuration (no duplicate fields), use human-readable labels for metric names, avoid misleading optional parameter indicators, and reliably access literal arguments when configuring model metrics.

title: Add trusted URLs to style-src-elem
summary: Updated the Vite configuration to add trusted URLs to the style-src-elem Content Security Policy directive. This allows stylesheets from specified trusted sources to load without triggering CSP violations.
